message: ci: bootstrap worker pnpm via corepack

files.patch:
@@ -37,8 +37,6 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"
-          cache: "pnpm"
-          cache-dependency-path: internal/tracking/worker/pnpm-lock.yaml
       - name: Enable Corepack (pnpm)
         run: |
           corepack enable
